name: kibo-qr-code
title: QR Code
author: Kibo UI
description: Generates an SVG QR code from a string.

changes: Required an accessible label and defaulted the rendered QR container to an image role.
Cleared stale SVG output and ignored obsolete asynchronous completions when QR inputs change.
Parsed supported CSS color strings through Culori instead of silently replacing non-oklch values with defaults.
Required an accessible label and defaulted the rendered QR container to an image role.

modifications.change: Required an accessible label, defaulted the client-rendered QR container to an image role, prevented stale asynchronous output after inputs change, and honored supported CSS color strings.
modifications.reason: Ensure generated QR graphics have a caller-supplied accessible name, always reflect the latest inputs, and do not silently ignore valid caller-supplied colors.

modifications.change: Required an accessible label and defaulted the server-rendered QR container to an image role.
modifications.reason: Keep client and server QR output equally identifiable to assistive technology.
